/CAL:APD SUPPL RPT ON MTR/VD:APD MTR HEARING/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:33 DAYS /ADDL CTS:33/X:1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL IS STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF THE FOLLOWING:/DOMV2: 52 WEEKS/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO WEAR GPS ANKLE MONITOR FOR ONE YEAR AND BE SUBJECT TO CURFEW BETWEEN 8 PM AND 6 AM EXCEPT WHEN ATTENDING CLASSES/CTORD:DEFENDANT MUST ATTEND ANGER MANAGEMENT ROADMAP TO PEACE & FATHERHOODFOR ONE YEAR/PROB EXT:01-17-21/4019HALF/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT - DV/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET APD MTR/SA1:LIZBATH KARINA CHI & ELIHANNA L/SA2:2949 18TH ST SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/X:BOXES 16 & 16B ARE CHECKED IN RE EXCHANGE OF CHILDREN/08    ASUPP RPT ON APD MTR/APD-MTR/SUPP:03-16-18/S50/CTORD:APD TO FORWARDREPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/CONTD:APD SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT/DOP/CONTD:APD MTR HEARING/DOP/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 5D/CTS:5/WS/DNACOMP/IND/WEAP/VREST/X:PARTIES STIPULATE THAT DEFENDANT MUST MAINTAIN EMPLOYMENT IN LIEU OF 1 YEAR IN PROGRAMAT SAN FRANCISCO CONSERVATION CORPS/X:DEFENDANT SHALL ENGAGEWITH ROADMAP TO SUCCESS (RTP) AND HE MUST FOLLOW ANY AND ALL ADDITIONAL RECOMMENDATIONS AND REFERRALS MADE BY HIS RTP CASE MANAGER WHICH INCLUDE, BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO: WEEKLY MEETINGS WITH CASE MANAGER, FELIPE HERNANDEZ, WEEKLY THERAPY WITH THERAPIST, SOLYMAR NEGRON, COMPLETE 4 MONTH PSYCHO-EDUCATIONAL WORKSHOPSERIES FOCUSED ON TRAMA RECOVERY AND HEALING, AND ATTEND CULTURAL AFFIRMATION GROUPS EVERY THIRD FRIDAY OF THE MONTH AS DIRECTED BY CASE MANGAER/ /X:AFTER SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF PROGRAM, DEFENDANT MAY PETITION THE COURTTOREDUCE FELONY COUNT TO A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO 17B/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/
